series_metadata.series_title: Other States Coverage (OSC) Employer Premium Audit Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Premium Audit Documents including completed audits, payroll summary sheet, recap of premium, reconciliation documents and ARDB requests.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 15 years per contract, maintain records in the I: Drive. ; Paper: If the record is paper (hard copy), then scan and once image has been verified, shred securely., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
